title: Dharma Sandehalu Live
desc: The host engages in an enlightening conversation with various religious scholars who answer the audience's questions about rituals and spiritual concepts, live.

title: Mahabharatha Sandesham
desc: A religious leader delivers a discourse on the Hindu epic Mahabharata and discusses its religious and spiritual significance.

title: Hanumath Vaibhavam
desc: A religious leader gives a discourse on the life of Hanuman, a primary Hindu deity, and reads scriptures from sacred holy books.

title: Mukha Panchasathi
desc: A religious leader recites a few slokas from the Mooka Pancha Sati in the praise of various gods and goddesses and explains their meaning.

title: Vara Phalalu
desc: An astrologer predicts the future of the people on the basis of the astral positioning of stars and planets and provides essential tips.

title: Sai Khetra Yatra
desc: Pious devotees go on a pilgrimage to present their offerings and worship Sai Baba, a saint revered by both Hindus and Muslims.

title: Mathrukha Mantra Stavam
desc: A compilation of devotional songs which are performed by various artists in praise of Goddess Tripura Sundari is played back-to-back.

title: Guru Geetha
desc: A religious leader delivers a discourse on the Hindu scripture of Guru Gita and the significance of a teacher in an individual's life.

title: Maha Bharatham Lo Bhisma Pitha Maha-chaganti
desc: A religious leader delivers a discourse on the role of Bhishma, the grandfather of the Pandavas and the Kauravas, in the Mahabharata.

title: Lalitha Sahasranamaalu
desc: The rendering of Lalitha Sahasranamam, a devotional hymn that contains a thousand exalted names of the Hindu Goddess, Lalitha Devi.

title: Margasiram Mukthi Dhayakam
desc: A religious leader delivers a discourse on spirituality by reciting a number of sacred verses to help devotees lead a life of righteousness.

title: Ujjein / Somanadh Live
desc: People partake in a religious ritual at a temple in Ujjain; devotees flock to the Somnath temple in Gujarat to pay their respects to the deity.

title: Krishna Leelalu
desc: A religious leader helps devotees gain a better understanding of their faith by sharing stories of Lord Krishna while also reciting devotional hymns.

title: Guru Swamula Mukha Mukhi
desc: The host interacts with a Hindu religious leader and provides detailed insights into the life story and teachings of Lord Ayyappa.

title: Sadhguru Vakkulu
desc: Sadhguru, a well-known Indian guru, shares valuable insights related to religious and spiritual topics in order to enlighten the viewers.
